title: Spiral Approach Pattern
summary: Corkscrew trajectory that presents a difficult targeting solution while closing distance.
details: Execute continuous lateral thrust while approaching a target, creating a spiral trajectory. This makes your position harder to predict while steadily closing range. Vary the timing and intensity of lateral burns to remain unpredictable. Most effective against turret-based point defense systems that have limited traverse speed. Trade-off: uses more fuel than direct approach.
annotations: Favored by fighter pilots in attack runs.
Less effective against modern predictive targeting.
